summary: Seonghyun Lim, Taeha Kim, and Sang-ri Yi presented at [EMI](https://www.emi-conference.org/). Sang-ri also presented at [ICCE](https://www.icce2026.com/) and [NHERI Computational Symposium](https://simcenter.designsafe-ci.org/nheri-computational-symposium/2026/).
details: Seonghyun Lim (Postdoc): Adaptation of stochastic emulation to shift of distribution.
Taeha Kim (Visiting PhD student, SNU): Adaptive covariance selection for joint input-state estimation of hysteretic structures.
Sang-ri Yi: Stochastic emulation for seismic risk assessment using recorded ground motions; Characterizing debris fields and emulating impact intensity measures.
